jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at TechSaksham
jsonLd.description:
TechSaksham invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About TechSaksham:
TechSaksham is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TechSaksham!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
